case.title: AMERICAN CHICLE CO. v. STATE TAX COMMISSION

opinion.h: AMERICAN CHICLE CO. v. STATE TAX COMMISSION, 368 U.S. 17 (1961)
AMERICAN CHICLE CO. v. STATE TAX COMMISSION OF NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 301. Decided October 23, 1961.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of substantial federal question.
Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, Paxton Blair, Solicitor General, and Robert W. Bush, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
